title: Rehman Dakait Vs Dhurandhar? Posters Attack Akhilesh's 'Lyari Raj', Back 'Dhurandhar' CM Yogi Adityanth
description: Is it Rehman Dakait vs Dhurandhar in Uttar Pradesh? Bollywood movie 'Dhurandhar' inspired posters have popped up in several districts of Uttar Pradesh, including Lucknow and Amethi, targeting Samajwadi Party (SP) chief Akhilesh Yadav ahead of the 2027 state Assembly elections.
